description: Track jacket has a polo collar with a full front zipped closure, long raglan sleeves and one black stripe from the shoulder to the cuffs, two asymmetric pockets on the front and embroidered branding on the left chest, track pants have an elasticated waistband with a drawstring, insert pockets on the sides, two black stripes on the sides from the waist to the hem and embroidered branding below the left pocket
